items.title: If I Could Only Buy 1 S&P 500 Stock From Each Sector for the Rest of 2025, I'd Go With These 11 Dividend Stocks
items.author: Daniel Foelber
items.description: An analysis of top dividend stocks across 11 different S&P 500 sectors, highlighting one recommended stock per sector based on dividend performance, growth potential, and market positioning.

items.title: US consumers continue to seek value: What recent earnings tell us
items.description: Walmart's (WMT) second quarter earnings results show that American consumers are continuing to look for value. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma joins Mind Your Money with Allie Canal to discuss the rise in value-seeking consumer behavior, highlighting recent statements from executives of consumer-facing brands this earnings cycle. Sign up for the Mind Your Money newsletter, and for more information and tools to help you handle your finances, click here. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Mind Your Money.
